title: Medical Assistant
description: Sanofi, a global pharmaceutical leader, seeks a Medical Assistant to support our clinical and administrative operations. Working fully remote, you'll assist with patient care coordination, administrative tasks, and clinical support. This entry-level role offers a foundation in healthcare and pharmaceutical operations.
responsibilities: Assist with patient intake and health history documentation
Schedule appointments and manage patient communications
Prepare examination rooms and sterilize medical equipment
Record vital signs and patient information
Support clinical staff with administrative and clinical tasks
Maintain patient confidentiality and HIPAA compliance

skills: Ability to multitask and manage priorities
